chunks.title: Call to Prophesy Against Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Introduction of the oracle and instruction for Ezekiel's physical reaction.

chunks.title: The Sharpened Sword Oracle
chunks.reason: A distinct prophetic vision describing the sword of judgment.

chunks.title: The King's Divination and Judgment on Israel
chunks.reason: Narrative of the Babylonian king's decision process and the prophecy regarding the throne.

chunks.title: Judgment on the Ammonites
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle specifically targeting the sons of Ammon.
